title: Protect Funding for Women's Health Care Act
short_title: Protect Funding for Women's Health Care Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
subjects: Social work, volunteer service, charitable organizations
crs_summary: Protect Funding for Women's Health Care Act This bill prohibits federal funding of Planned Parenthood Federation of America or its affiliates, subsidiaries, successors, or clinics.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
